chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q1_analysis: The paper provides a link to the source code repository on GitHub (https://github.com/CompArchCam/DSN25-AE), which is publicly available.
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q2_analysis: The evaluation uses physical testbeds, specifically the gem5 simulator with detailed CPU models for high-performance server-style Arm cores.
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q3_analysis: The paper has a clear and explicit section detailing the 'Fault Model' (section III-C) stating precise assumptions about asynchronous network and up to f Byzantine nodes.
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q4_analysis: The paper provides a rigorous, data-driven analysis of the performance trade-offs, including quantifying the exact cost of replication, checkpointing overhead, and energy consumption.
